|---|---|---|---|
| Avg Speed | 3.797 m/s | 3.493 m/s | **109%** |
| Avg Power | 307 W | 290 W | **106%** |
| Avg HR | 138 bpm | 127 bpm | **109%** |
| METs | 11.25 | 10.65 | **106%** |
| Distance | 15.76 km | 11.71 km | **135%** |
| Duration | 73.1 min | 58.2 min | **126%** |
